headline: Why Nike CEO said the company's turnaround needs more time

headline: Nike (NKE) Valuation Check After Steep Share Price Slide And Mixed Market Signals
summary: Recent performance snapshot NIKE (NKE) has been under pressure, with the stock down about 4% over the past day, 2% over the past week, and 33% year to date. Over the past 3 months, the stock has declined 33%. See our latest analysis for NIKE. headline: Under Armour Tanks 18% After Earnings. Sales Continue to Slide.
summary: Shares of  Under Armour  plummeted Tuesday after the sportswear retailer finished off a third consecutive fiscal year of falling sales and issued weak guidance for 2027.  The company reported an adjusted loss of 3 cents a share for the fiscal fourth quarter, a tick below analysts’ consensus call for a loss of 2 cents.  Analysts had expected slight revenue growth and adjusted earnings of 23 cents a share.

raw.headline: Under Armour Tanks 18% After Earnings. Sales Continue to Slide.
raw.summary: Shares of  Under Armour  plummeted Tuesday after the sportswear retailer finished off a third consecutive fiscal year of falling sales and issued weak guidance for 2027.  The company reported an adjusted loss of 3 cents a share for the fiscal fourth quarter, a tick below analysts’ consensus call for a loss of 2 cents.  Analysts had expected slight revenue growth and adjusted earnings of 23 cents a share.

headline: TJX, Gap and Other Retail Stocks That Could Be AI Winners
summary: With the proliferation of artificial intelligence, everyone will have their own personal shopper in their pocket.  While some retailers may fear that change, it’s actually likely to benefit them.  The ever-increasing shift toward online sales has set the stage for AI in retail, with plenty of retailers already using it to their benefit.
